title: Steamed Chwinamul Paella
description: A Saudi-inspired dish that combines the flavors of the Arabian Peninsula with the comforting goodness of paella. This recipe is easily prepared in a donabe and steamed to perfection.
instructions: Rinse the donabe and heat the vegetable oil in it over medium heat.
Add the smoky spices and stir for 1 minute.
Add the chopped chwinamul and cook until tender.
Add the donabe rice and stir to combine.
Add 3 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Cover the donabe with a lid and transfer to a steamer.
Steam for 15-20 minutes or until the rice is cooked.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
